languages.text: "Как ты попал на флагман? Как стал вивисектором?"
"How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"
languages.original_text: "Как ты попал на флагман? Как стал вивисектором?"

traits.locale_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"
"How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"
"How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

languages.text: "Wie kommt es, dass Ihr auf dem Flaggschiff dient?" "Wie seid Ihr Vivisektor geworden?"
languages.original_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie kommt es, dass Ihr auf dem Flaggschiff dient?" "Wie seid Ihr Vivisektor geworden?"

languages.text: « Comment en êtes-vous venu à servir à bord du vaisseau amiral ? Comment êtes-vous devenu vivisecteur ? »
languages.original_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

traits.locale_text: « Comment en êtes-vous venu à servir à bord du vaisseau amiral ? Comment êtes-vous devenu vivisecteur ? »

languages.text: “你怎么会来旗舰服役？又是怎么成为解剖者的？”
languages.original_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

traits.locale_text: “你怎么会来旗舰服役？又是怎么成为解剖者的？”

languages.text: «¿Cómo acabó sirviendo en la nave insignia? ¿Por qué se hizo vivisector?».
languages.original_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo acabó sirviendo en la nave insignia? ¿Por qué se hizo vivisector?».

languages.text: "どうやってフラッグシップに乗ったの？どうやってヴィヴィセクターになったのですか？"
languages.original_text: "How did you get on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

languages.text: "Sancak gemisinde hizmet etmeye nasıl başladın? Nasıl dirikesimci oldun?"
languages.original_text: "How did you come to serve on the flagship? How did you become a vivisector?"

traits.locale_text: "Sancak gemisinde hizmet etmeye nasıl başladın? Nasıl dirikesimci oldun?"
